description_long: This object consists of four red barrels, each featuring prominent silver or gray horizontal reinforcement bands encircling their bodies. The barrels have a classic cylindrical shape with slightly bulging sides and flat, polygonal ends, giving them a stylized, robust appearance. The surface of each barrel is smooth with visible faceting, and the metallic bands provide both structural support and a visual accent. Faint white markings or stenciled text are visible on the sides, suggesting labeling or branding, though the details are not fully legible. The barrels are grouped together, with three standing upright and one lying on its side, indicating they are movable and likely used for storage or transport. Their size and design suggest they are suitable for use in urban or industrial environments, such as alleys, garages, or construction sites.
description: A group of four red barrels with silver reinforcement bands and faint white markings, designed for urban or industrial use. Three barrels stand upright while one lies on its side, all featuring a robust, smooth exterior.
description_view_0: Three upright red barrels and one barrel lying on its side, showing the tops and the silver bands clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the horizontal silver bands and the cylindrical shape of the barrels, with the lying barrel's side fully visible.
description_view_2: View from behind the lying barrel, emphasizing the flat ends and the arrangement of the upright barrels in the background.
description_view_3: Rear angle showing the upright barrels' backs and the lying barrel's side, with visible white markings on the surfaces.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: faint white stenciled text or markings
